final_prompt.prompt:
Create a banner news/hot-topic feature image for Weibo.

Style/medium: must be professional documentary photography style, news-reportage aesthetic, high-impact yet authentic, sharp 8K detail, shot-like-on-phone advanced quality
Composition: must be wide 16:9 horizontal banner, ample negative space for text overlay, lateral extension across frame
Subject: must include city skyline at dusk with neon lights gradually illuminating, pedestrians in motion blur, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow, strong dramatic light-shadow contrast, authentic on-site atmosphere
Scene/backdrop: must include urban dusk cityscape with layered depth from foreground pedestrians to distant towers
Lighting/mood: must be golden hour transitioning to neon dusk, dramatic chiaroscuro, real-world documentary lighting
Color palette: must blend warm sunset amber with cool neon cyan/magenta, high contrast
Materials/textures: must include glass building reflections, motion-blur pedestrian silhouettes, gritty urban surface details
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large headline, bold/modern typeface, prominent placement), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary subtitle), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or lower-right)
Constraints: must be strict 16:9 aspect ratio, professional editorial grade, authentic Weibo hot-post visual identity
Avoid:
